 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Здравствуйте, Олег!
15 июня наступает новолуние в Близнецах. И если вы когда-либо задавались вопросом, почему астрологические события и таро часто упоминают вместе -- сейчас хороший момент это объяснить.
Таро и лунные циклы описывают одно и то же -- но разными языками. Луна в астрологии отвечает за внутреннее состояние человека, за то, что происходит под поверхностью: эмоции, интуиция, скрытые страхи и желания. 
Карты таро работают с тем же слоем. Не с тем, что вы думаете о ситуации, а с тем, что вы на самом деле чувствуете -- но еще не сформулировали. 
 Вытянуть карты [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/taro/mastertaro?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Именно поэтому в моменты лунных событий расклад даёт особенно точный ответ: внутренний слой в эти дни ближе к поверхности, чем обычно, и карты считывают его яснее.
​
Вытягивать карты можно уже с 14 июня -- энергия новолуния активна за сутки до и сутки после. Олег, три карты в этой точке покажут -- что именно открывается для вас в новом цикле, какой разговор или решение требует вашего внимания и с чего начать, чтобы этот цикл прошёл осознанно, а не по инерции.
 Вытянуть карты [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/taro/mastertaro?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
 Новолуние -- это всегда начало нового цикла. Не в смысле «всё обнулилось», а в смысле -- появляется точка входа. Что-то, что раньше казалось закрытым, снова становится возможным. 
 Теперь в Astromix вы можете задать свой вопрос и вытянуть карты самостоятельно 💜
Это ваше личное пространство для поиска ответов. Всё работает очень просто, но при этом глубоко:
Сформулируйте намерение. Сосредоточьтесь на вопросе, который сейчас беспокоит вас больше всего. Важно почувствовать этот запрос внутри.
Выберите свои карты. Доверьтесь интуиции и

74625.subject: Tokenize it
74625.body:
View this post on the web at https://uniswap.substack.com/p/tokenize-it

this week: rwa summer ∞ defi made simple ∞ fidelity onchain ∞ ai fund management ∞ bankr at $4b ∞ everything you need to know about uniswap auctions
Community news
Discover and swap real world assets on Uniswap: Tokenized assets are live on the Uniswap Web App, Wallet, and API [ https://substack.com/redirect/ab494568-0980-4422-b1aa-ca400c9061c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. This means users can discover and trade securities [ https://substack.com/redirect/d4e2b696-8b8a-436a-9bb2-11265c6c60f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] like SpaceX, Apple, Tesla, NVIDIA, S&P 500 and more directly from Uniswap apps. It’s the same flow you use for any other swap.
To date, more than $9.1 billion has been swapped in real-world asset pools on the Uniswap Protocol, across over 2.6 million transactions by more than 140k wallets, and that’s just a fraction of what’s coming. Equity, fixed income, and yield-bearing instruments make up the bulk of global financial assets. Now, they’re beginning to move onchain, as more jurisdictions clarify access, and apps integrate them into the surfaces users already trust.
For Uniswap API teams, the same infrastructure that powers wallets, portfolio tools, and trading interfaces now extends to regulated asset markets. No update needed. You can get started here [ https://substack.com/redirect/926c240d-b9e6-4cf5-a161-3a09fd199816?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ].
By the way: it’s never been easier to swap. [ https://substack.com/redirect/2bfc0f7f-c8ef-4de6-9df6-d0842de6634f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] In 2026, half of all new traders across Ethereum, Arbitrum and Base made their first ever swap on Uniswap. Last week we shipped four updates to make onboarding even simpler. Create a wallet in seconds from the Web App, track profit and loss across every token you hold, and see your tokens across chains as one combined balance. Plus, crosschain swaps now happen in a single action, no separate bridge step.
While we’re talking wallets: Uniswap API now powers ~31% of MetaMask mainnet swaps [ https://substack.com/redirect/80dd547a-51e2-43f7-8b10-d7326c3ec52d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. In March, MetaMask integrated Uniswap API as one of their native swap providers, giving users direct access to liquidity across Uniswap v2, v3, v4, and UniswapX. Since then, the API has processed more than $126M of volume for users and, on average, is winning more MetaMask swaps than any other swap provider on Ethereum Mainnet.
UniswapX adds support for four new chains: UniswapX, Uniswap’s intent-based execution layer, is expanding beyond Mainnet. It’s now live on Tempo, Base, BNB, and Avalanche. For Uniswap API teams, this means the API will automatically route through UniswapX on these chains

74624.subject: 🔷 The Daily: BlackRock's new Bitcoin ETF
74624.body:
Binance may be forced to halt services for EU clients next month | Robinhood cuts 10% of staff, expects $28 million in restructuring charges | Coinbase launching tokenized US stocks, backed 1:1, with holders able to receive dividends | Bitcoin Policy UK CEO calls Michael Saylor's STRC investment promotion 'dishonest' |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin's* latest rally back above $65,000 and another *HYPE* all-time high have lifted sentiment, but analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404920/bitcoin-rally-hype-record-run-market-waiting-real-conviction-analysts?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) at *Wintermute* , *Glassnode* , and *Bitfinex* warn that ETF flows, stablecoin growth, and institutional demand still fall short of confirming a lasting market reversal.

In today's newsletter, *BlackRock* launches a new *Bitcoin* ETF, *Binance* could reportedly lose its EU license bid, *Robinhood* cuts 10% of its staff, and more.

Meanwhile, *SEC* Chair *Paul Atkins* defended ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404956/sec-atkins-defends-cftc-selig-questions-agencys-ability-regulate-prediction-markets?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *CFTC* Chair *Michael Selig* despite questions over the agency's ability to regulate prediction markets.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🚀 BlackRock launches new Bitcoin ETF that generates income using a covered call strategy*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404825/blackrock-launches-new-ishares-bitcoin-premium-income-etf-covered-call-nasdaq?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*BlackRock* launched its *iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (BITA)* , a new fund that combines *bitcoin* exposure with monthly income generated from option premiums.

* BITA holds spot bitcoin and shares of BlackRock's *IBIT* ETF, while selling call options on roughly 25%-35% of its IBIT position to generate yield for investors.
* BlackRock said the product targets investors seeking bitcoin exposure alongside income, allowing them to retain most upside potential while collecting option premium distributions.
* The launch adds to a growing category of covered-call bitcoin ETFs as issuers l

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Ripple expands into Africa through a Flutterwave investment. Standard Chartered sees major upside for Uniswap if tokenized assets move onchain. Binance faces potential MiCA licensing hurdles in Europe. Coinbase plans tokenized shares with dividend payments while Ethereum’s next major upgrade enters final development stages. Bitcoin weakens alongside oil as markets react to easing geopolitical tensions. 💹 Ripple targets Africa’s remittance market with Flutterwave investment Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction. Find out more 💸 Standard Chartered’s $100 Uniswap call exposes the open DeFi problem Wall Street may need to solve The reported $100 UNI target hinges on tokenized assets leaving closed rails for liquid, composable markets. The post Standard Chartered’s $100 Uniswap call exposes the open DeFi problem Wall Street may need to solve appeared first on CryptoSlate. Source 📰 Binance Faces Potential EU Exit as MiCA License Approval Doubts Grow Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange, could soon face one of its biggest regulatory challenges in Europe. Reports suggest its application is facing a potential rejection of its MiCA license application in Greece. Discover more 🔑 Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities. Read more 📊 Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment. Explore more 🪙 State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market. Source 📈 Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78 Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum, with traders seeing a quick end to the BTC price rebound. More details Stay ahead in crypto. 74621.subject: The US-Iran deal threatens “glorious failure” for Israel
74621.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDl9AAcAAAAAAse7q_GrVa654X_cCWroyRqFif8Df7MHwyXqNybuwMjwBNShQMSEQriA8PdKpyHb1kPKQU9S07Y0zCjm1K0Wy3MoGzc10Yc_Q7EM7irCpA 

June 16th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDl9AAcAAAAAAse7q_GsmG4alPUIo_zLhS6R6m2NxRt31LLtQtCX2yo2A5iivD8XFvKRNpOa942EqW2yiGz8JCoN_2qT0IUUumq2suG9QsXPLSF2EENJ_A 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDl9AAcAAAAAAse7q_GtZ0xKy7_5SSzlxu-eMNL4PhuqJ5B3RUthSlA_GzC_ZAJ0LilEe03szqh8sjJNEClilbaI_BSxMhm0Ne8cYGqgIK4XAwDAPzlxxQ 



 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



 When America and Israel set off to begin the war in Iran, it was hard to know where one country’s aims ended and the other’s began. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDl9AAcAAAAAAse7q_GunTQ5JD3xQ8sgGc570WI2GFOdVB7J3j9xVeRV7u1dNB6Fygnye1ORhBi-aslkerHdjAL-2NfWQkc8efljlKPyr-8uksft 
No longer .
 The two sides gradually diverged, until Donald Trump left Binyamin Netanyahu out of negotiations with Iran. Israel’s prime minister will struggle to persuade his voters that the latest deal is a victory.


 Economists can turn their attention to a new topic quickly when they need to, as during the financial crisis and the pandemic. But good research on the impact of AI has been slower to come. 
 
https://click.e.econ
